rationale: This is a clean task where the agent successfully inspected all required files (routes.tsx, main.tsx, LogoOnlyLayout.tsx, Page404.tsx, dashboard/index.tsx, SidebarConfig.tsx, AuthLayout.tsx) and provided an accurate, comprehensive explanation of the routing architecture. The final answer correctly describes the two-layout structure (DashboardLayout with /dashboard/* routes and LogoOnlyLayout with auth/public routes), the redirect behavior (/ → /dashboard, /dashboard → /dashboard/app, catch-all → /404), auth pages (login/register accessible under LogoOnlyLayout), the unused AuthLayout, and the 404 fallback mechanism. All details match the actual file contents in the tool outputs.
